title: cyclosorus cumingianus
intro: Cyclosorus cumingianus, also known as the Cuming's fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and Australia, characterized by its large fronds and unique leaf structure. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus cumingianus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in topical ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
